queries.query: What is the status of my order ORD-001?
Can you check on order ORD-002 for me? I want to know when it arrives.
I placed order ORD-003 three days ago and haven't gotten any updates on delivery.
I need a refund for order ORD-001. The laptop I received was defective.
I want my money back for order ORD-002. They sent me the wrong phone model.
Please process a return and refund for order ORD-003. The item arrived with a broken screen.
This is absolutely terrible service! My package has been lost for two weeks and nobody is helping me. I am beyond frustrated and will never shop here again!
I am extremely upset. I was charged twice for the same order and I've been waiting three weeks with zero resolution. This is completely unacceptable and I want to speak to a manager!

queries.note: Contains 'where' — triggers Bug 1 (30% misrouting probability to refund_agent)

queries.query: I have a problem with something I bought last week and I'm not happy about it
queries.note: Vague, no order ID — triggers Bug 3 (OrderAgent retries up to 5 times)
